get.description:
Get the balance of a wallet for a given chain and currency

**API scope required**: `wallets:balance.read`

parameters.name: X-API-KEY
parameters.description: API key required for authentication

parameters.name: walletLocator
parameters.description:
A wallet locator can be of the format:
- `<walletAddress>`
- `email:<email>:<walletType>`
- `userId:<userId>:<walletType>`
- `userId:<userId>:<walletType>` (white label user example)
- `phoneNumber:<phoneNumber>:<walletType>`
- `twitter:<handle>:<walletType>`
- `x:<handle>:<walletType>`
- `me:<walletType>` (Use when calling from the client side with a client API key)

parameters.name: chains
parameters.description: The blockchain(s) to query. Comma-separated list of chains

parameters.name: tokens
parameters.description: The tokens to query. Comma-separated list

200.description: Returns the balance of the wallet for the given chain and currency

400.description: Returns an error (400) if the wallet locator is invalid or if the address type is not supported

post.description:
Send funds to a wallet.

**API scope required**: `wallets.fund`

parameters.name: X-API-KEY
parameters.description: API key required for authentication

parameters.name: walletLocator
parameters.description:
A wallet locator can be of the format:
- `<walletAddress>`
- `email:<email>:<walletType>`
- `userId:<userId>:<walletType>`
- `userId:<userId>:<walletType>` (white label user example)
- `phoneNumber:<phoneNumber>:<walletType>`
- `twitter:<handle>:<walletType>`
- `x:<handle>:<walletType>`
- `me:<walletType>` (Use when calling from the client side with a client API key)

404.description: Returns an error (404) if a wallet with the specified locator not found

post.description: Sends a token of any type from the authenticated user's wallet to a recipient

parameters.name: X-API-KEY
parameters.description: API key required for authentication

parameters.name: tokenLocator
parameters.description:
A token locator that supports native tokens, fungible tokens, and NFTs across different chains. It can be of the format:
- `chain:address[:tokenId]`
- `chain:currency`
- `chain:address`

parameters.name: x-idempotency-key
parameters.description: Unique key to prevent duplicate transaction creation

201.description: The transaction has been successfully created.

get.summary: Get Wallet Activity For Authenticated User (Unstable)
get.description:
Retrieves activity history for the authenticated user's wallet including transactions and other relevant events. This is an unstable API that may change without notice.

**API scope required**: `wallets.read`

parameters.name: X-API-KEY
parameters.description: API key required for authentication

parameters.name: chain
parameters.description: The blockchain network to query. Either an EVM chain, Solana, or Stellar.

parameters.name: tokens
parameters.description: The tokens to query. Comma-separated list of either tokens or token locator strings

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: The status of the transfers to query

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: Filter transfers from this date (inclusive). ISO 8601 format. Supported for EVM and Stellar chains.

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description: Filter transfers until this date (inclusive). ISO 8601 format. Supported for EVM and Stellar chains.

200.description: The wallet activity has been successfully retrieved.

404.description: Returns an error if a wallet with the specified type not found for the authenticated user

- `chainType[:<walletType>]:alias:<alias>`

post.description:
Submit approval signature for a pending transaction. Required for transactions using external signers.

**API scope required**: `wallets:transactions.sign`

parameters.name: X-API-KEY
parameters.description: API key required for authentication

400.description: Returns an error if the signer is not valid

parameters.description: API key required for authentication

404.description: Returns an error if the wallet or transaction is not found

post.description:
Creates a new transaction for the authenticated user. Transaction will be automatically broadcast once it has all necessary approvals.

**API scope required**: `wallets:transactions.create`

parameters.name: X-API-KEY
parameters.description: API key required for authentication

201.description: The transaction has been successfully created.

400.description: Returns an error if the transaction or the provided signer is not valid

404.description: Returns an error if a wallet with the specified type is not found

422.description: Returns an error if the transaction fails during simulation

parameters.description: API key required for authentication

parameters.name: walletLocator
parameters.description:
A wallet locator can be of the format:
- `<walletAddress>`
- `email:<email>:<chainType>[:<walletType>][:alias:<alias>]` (walletType defaults to 'smart')
- `userId:<userId>:<chainType>[:<walletType>][:alias:<alias>]` (white label user example)
- `phoneNumber:<phoneNumber>:<chainType>[:<walletType>][:alias:<alias>]`
- `twitter:<handle>:<chainType>[:<walletType>][:alias:<alias>]`
- `x:<handle>:<chainType>[:<walletType>][:alias:<alias>]`
- `me:<chainType>[:<walletType>][:alias:<alias>]` (Use when calling from the client side with a client API key)
- `chainType[:<walletType>]:alias:<alias>`

parameters.name: tokens
parameters.description: The tokens to query. Comma-separated list of either tokens or token locator strings

recipient.description:
An address locator that supports different types of recipients. It can be of the format:
- `<address>` (wallet address)
- `chain:address` (e.g. ethereum:0x1234...)
- `address:<blockchain_address>[:chain]`
- `email:<email_address>[:chain]`
- `phoneNumber:<phone_number>[:chain]`
- `twitter:<twitter_handle>[:chain]`
- `x:<twitter_handle>[:chain]`
- `userId:<user_id>[:chain]`
